home.usageNotice: If you wish to use my artworks, please notify me and provide a link.

price.title: Illustrate of the price
items: Illustration(Above the thigh, without the sole of the foot): 3000-5000NT
price.r18: R18 is fine, but not accept R18-G
notes: Two or more people, the price will be multiplied by the number of the characters.
If need to design the background will charge additional 300-700NT(Monochrome or white background does not need to increase the price.)
If need to design the character's costume will charge additional 800NT
If you dont know the content you want will charge additional 800NT(Which means I need to help you think the content&idea)

process.title: The Process of Artwork
process.diff: ※The difference version is priced according to the requirements!
process.revision: In the second review of the manuscript, that is, when preparing for the final manuscript processing, you can have 1 major change (such as overall action) and 3 minor changes (such as color, some small shapes, etc.). Of course, it would be best to raise it during the draft stage (because it won't use up the number of changes)!
notes: If the time of changes is exceeded, an additional TWD500 will be charged!
The final price will change according to the content required by the client
process.contact: Welcome to ask if you have any questions of request.

copyright.nobuyoutDesc: (Which means I own the copyright; no resale, modification by others, or commercial use permitted.)
